name: plan-keeper
description: Seven skills for organizing markdown plans in ~/plans/<repo>/. plan-list shows a read-only inventory of a repo's plans (grouped by Status, newest-first) without picking one; plan-save captures plans from conversation; plan-do routes a plan to the right next skill; plan-done archives a completed plan into ~/plans/<repo>/done/ with a frontmatter completion stamp; plan-update edits frontmatter (Agent, Status, Ticket); plan-crew shows the groundcrew queue across all repos, bulk-promotes/dequeues plans (Status todo/backlog), and stamps the groundcrew Ticket on promote; plan-push files the plan as a Linear or Jira ticket. Backed by a bundled plan_keeper_cli.py that handles I/O, frontmatter, atomic-write mutation, per-repo config (~/plans/<repo>/.plankeeper.json) for Linear/Jira credentials and defaults, and the network calls to Linear GraphQL / Jira REST. Also ships shell-adapter wrappers (plan-keeper/groundcrew/) so groundcrew can dispatch tickets directly from ~/plans/<repo>/*.md. Includes a PreToolUse hook that auto-approves invocations of the bundled CLI.
